@props(['body']) <div class="flex flex-col gap-3"> <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">Body</h2> @if($body) <div class="bg-white dark:bg-white/[2%] border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800 rounded-md overflow-x-auto p-5 text-sm font-mono shadow-xs"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::syntax-highlight :code="$body" language="json" /> </div> @else <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::empty-state message="No request body" /> @endif </div>
